deep_dive.title: Dialogs: a studio-quality expressive conversational Russian speech corpus for dialog assistants
deep_dive.abstract: We introduce Dialogs, a studio-quality Russian conversational speech corpus for dialog assistants. The dataset contains 20.6 hours of face-to-face acted dialogs recorded in a professional studio (44.1 kHz stereo) and segmented into 11,796 utterances across 3 speakers. Unlike read-speech resources, Dialogs captures turn-taking rhythm and expressive prosody, and provides per-utterance style/emotion labels spanning 12 categories. We validate corpus quality with crowd MOS tests, showing comparable audio quality and intelligibility to strong Russian studio baselines while achieving higher ratings for expressiveness and conversational naturalness. Finally, we train a VITS2 model as a proof of concept, demonstrating that Dialogs supports training expressive, dialog-like TTS despite limited per-speaker data.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: studio-quality conversational speech corpus with expressive prosody for TTS, demonstrating improved naturalness
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于TTS的工作室质量对话语音语料库，展示增强的自然度
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于TTS的工作室质量对话语音语料库，展示增强的自然度
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于TTS的工作室质量对话语音语料库，展示增强的自然度
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: A studio-quality Russian conversational speech corpus with expressive labels, validating improved TTS quality via VITS2 model.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该语料库弥补了俄语对话语音资源在表现力和自然度上的不足，包含20.6小时专业录音，标注12类风格/情感。通过MOS测试证明其音频质量和自然度优于现有俄语基线，并利用VITS2模型验证了其在提升语音合成表现力方面的潜力，为对话助理开发提供了高质量数据基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该语料库弥补了俄语对话语音资源在表现力和自然度上的不足，包含20.6小时专业录音，标注12类风格/情感。通过MOS测试证明其音频质量和自然度优于现有俄语基线，并利用VITS2模型验证了其在提升语音合成表现力方面的潜力，为对话助理开发提供了高质量数据基础。

deep_dive.title: RW-Voice-EQ Bench: A Real World Benchmark for Evaluating Voice AI Systems
deep_dive.abstract: Current voice AI benchmarks typically evaluate isolated capabilities such as speech intelligibility, word error rate, or text-based dialogue quality, but they rarely test whether systems harness the acoustic information that distinguishes spoken language from its textual representation. To this end, we introduce the Real World Voice EQ Bench, a multidimensional benchmark for evaluating voice AI across text-to-speech (TTS), speech-to-speech (STS), speech understanding (SU), and automatic speech recognition (ASR). Our evaluations indicate that performance is highly dimension-specific. For TTS, naturalness, expressiveness, identity stability, and reliability are largely independent evaluation dimensions. For STS, access to audio does not guarantee use of vocal affect, and some agents remain largely transcript-driven. For SU, models perform unevenly across paralinguistic tasks. For ASR, real world accent, emotion, noise, and conversational conditions expose failures that are not captured by established clean-speech benchmarks. Together, these results show that voice AI should be evaluated as a profile of acoustic, expressive, interactional, and robustness capabilities rather than by a single aggregate score.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Multi-dimensional benchmark covering TTS, STS, SU, ASR for holistic voice AI evaluation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 覆盖TTS、STS、SU、ASR的多维基准实现语音AI整体评估
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 覆盖TTS、STS、SU、ASR的多维基准实现语音AI整体评估
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 覆盖TTS、STS、SU、ASR的多维基准实现语音AI整体评估
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces RW-Voice-EQ Bench, a comprehensive benchmark evaluating voice AI systems across multiple speech tasks, revealing that performance is highly dimension-specific.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出RW-Voice-EQ Bench，一个多维基准，覆盖语音合成、语音到语音翻译、语音理解和语音识别，发现各维度性能高度独立，为全栈语音AI评价提供了新工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出RW-Voice-EQ Bench，一个多维基准，覆盖语音合成、语音到语音翻译、语音理解和语音识别，发现各维度性能高度独立，为全栈语音AI评价提供了新工具。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 语音识别、合成、交互、语音大模型、多模态大模型, especially work that connects or combines: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques; text to speech quality enhancement methods; voice user interface conversational AI design; large-scale self-supervised speech model training; vision and speech multimodal learning; data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training; advanced training methodologies for large speech models; techniques to enhance speech recognition performance and accuracy; efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed.

deep_dive.title: Video = World + Event Stream
deep_dive.abstract: We present Wan-Streamer v0.3, which reframes our native-streaming interaction model under a single organizing view: a video is a world plus an event stream. The world is the persistent context in which a video unfolds, including the environment, scene, subjects, ambient acoustic conditions, voice characteristics, and other relatively stable conditions. The event stream is everything that changes over time within that world, including scene or environmental changes, subject behavior, speech, and other sounds. This yields a general-purpose pretraining task over large amounts of real video: given a world and incoming input, predict how the world moves, changes, and responds in real time. The resulting competence can be specialized to a broad family of real-time downstream tasks. We instantiate it on real-time full-duplex audio-visual interaction, where the event stream is the agent's speech together with free-form behavior. Functionally, the model's multimodal understanding process is vision-language-action-like: it maps multimodal user input to language-form speech and behavior actions. Wan-Streamer v0.3 preserves the v0.2 operating point: 640x368 video at 25 FPS, a 160 ms streaming unit, approximately 200 ms model-side response latency, and approximately 550 ms total interaction latency under a 350 ms bidirectional network budget.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Multimodal video+audio pretraining model with speech and sound
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 融合语音和声音的视频+音频多模态预训练模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 融合语音和声音的视频+音频多模态预训练模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 融合语音和声音的视频+音频多模态预训练模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Presents a native-streaming video interaction model that treats video as a world plus event stream, jointly modeling visual and audio (including speech) changes, enabling real-time multi-modal tasks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 提出将视频解构为世界与事件流的原生流式交互模型，通过在大规模真实视频上预训练，统一表征场景、语音、声音等，预测世界的实时变化。该方法可泛化至多种实时多模态下游任务，为视觉与语音的多模态学习提供了新框架。该工作展示了从原始视频中同时学习视觉和声学信息的能力，为语音识别、合成等任务的多模态融合提供了坚实基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 提出将视频解构为世界与事件流的原生流式交互模型，通过在大规模真实视频上预训练，统一表征场景、语音、声音等，预测世界的实时变化。该方法可泛化至多种实时多模态下游任务，为视觉与语音的多模态学习提供了新框架。该工作展示了从原始视频中同时学习视觉和声学信息的能力，为语音识别、合成等任务的多模态融合提供了坚实基础。

quick_skim.title: Improving Text-to-Audio Instruction Following via Fine-Grained Feedback from Audio-Aware Large Language Models
quick_skim.abstract: Recent text-to-audio models generate high-quality audio, but often fail to follow instructions involving multiple sound events and temporal order. This gap arises because existing evaluation and training signals mainly emphasize global similarity or perceptual quality, with limited supervision on instruction-level correctness. We propose an instruction-level framework that uses audio-aware large language models (ALLMs) as fine-grained judges to verify target event presence and temporal relations in generated audio. After validating ALLM judgments on benchmarks and through human verification, we use their feedback to construct preference pairs for direct preference optimization. We further introduce S3Bench, a narrative benchmark for evaluating multi-event temporal instruction following. Experiments show that our method improves event completeness, temporal ordering, and joint instruction-following accuracy across existing benchmarks and S3Bench, while maintaining audio quality.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Uses audio-aware LLMs as judges to improve instruction following in text-to-audio generation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用音频感知大语言模型作为裁判改善文本到音频生成中的指令遵循
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用音频感知大语言模型作为裁判改善文本到音频生成中的指令遵循
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用音频感知大语言模型作为裁判改善文本到音频生成中的指令遵循
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes fine-grained feedback from audio-aware LLMs to improve text-to-audio models' instruction following, focusing on event presence and temporal order.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对文本到音频模型在复杂指令遵循上的不足，引入音频感知大语言模型作为细粒度评判者，通过直接偏好优化提升生成音频的事件准确性和时序正确性。

quick_skim.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

quick_skim.title: Efficient Text-to-Audio Generation via Pruning
quick_skim.abstract: Diffusion-based text-to-audio generative models such as AudioLDM achieve high perceptual quality and strong semantic consistency; however, their practical deployment is hindered by the substantial computational cost of the U-Net denoising backbone. In this work, we apply model pruning to improve the computational efficiency of AudioLDM, a U-Net-based text-conditioned audio latent diffusion model. We analyse parameter redundancy across U-Net convolutional blocks and evaluate a filter-pruning strategy. Pruning is guided by norm-based criteria and followed by lightweight finetuning to recover performance losses. Experimental results demonstrate that up to 83% of the parameters and 39% of the multiply-accumulate operations of U-Net have been reduced while maintaining, and in some cases improving, generation quality compared to the baseline unpruned network. We find that pruning affects AudioLDM's ability to generate certain sound events including safety-critical sounds such as gunshots, sirens, and explosions, as well as mechanical sounds such as drills and sewing machines, and other sounds such as sprays and tick-tocks, which are mostly recovered by lightweight finetuning of the pruned model.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Pruning for efficient text-to-audio generation, applicable to speech synthesis efficiency
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 剪枝用于高效的文本到音频生成，可应用于语音合成效率
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 剪枝用于高效的文本到音频生成，可应用于语音合成效率
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 剪枝用于高效的文本到音频生成，可应用于语音合成效率
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Applies model pruning to AudioLDM to reduce parameters and operations while maintaining audio quality, improving computational efficiency.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对文本到音频扩散模型计算成本高的问题，对AudioLDM的U-Net进行剪枝，减少最多83%参数量和39%乘加运算，轻量微调后性能不降甚至提升，为生成式音频模型的高效部署提供了路径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对文本到音频扩散模型计算成本高的问题，对AudioLDM的U-Net进行剪枝，减少最多83%参数量和39%乘加运算，轻量微调后性能不降甚至提升，为生成式音频模型的高效部署提供了路径。

quick_skim.title: SLT 2026 REAL-TSE Challenge: Real-world Target Speaker Extraction from Conversational Recordings
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce the REAL-TSE Challenge, an IEEE SLT 2026 satellite challenge on target speaker extraction~(TSE) from real conversational recordings. Given a multi-speaker mixture and one or more enrollment utterances from a target speaker, participating systems must recover only the target speech. Unlike simulated read-speech benchmarks, REAL-TSE evaluates Mandarin and English recordings that contain natural overlap, reverberation, noise, channel mismatch, and conversational dynamics. The challenge defines two complementary tracks: an Online track for low-latency streaming extraction and an Offline track for full-context processing. Systems are evaluated with Token Error Rate (TER), Speaker Similarity (SpkSim), DNSMOS, and target-speaker activity F1. This overview paper describes the task definition, datasets, baselines, evaluation protocol, submitted systems, condition-wise findings, and lessons for future real-world TSE benchmarks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: target speaker extraction from real conversational recordings, as a front-end for speech processing like ASR
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 从真实对话录音中提取目标说话人，作为ASR等语音处理的前端
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 从真实对话录音中提取目标说话人，作为ASR等语音处理的前端
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 从真实对话录音中提取目标说话人，作为ASR等语音处理的前端
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a challenge on real-world target speaker extraction from conversational recordings in Mandarin and English, with online and offline tracks, aiming to advance robust front-end for ASR and communication.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对当前目标说话人提取基准脱离真实场景的问题，本文推出SLT 2026 REAL-TSE挑战，采用真实中英文对话录音，包含重叠、混响等复杂条件，并设在线与离线两个赛道。该挑战为高效前端处理提供了标准化评测平台，有望促进ASR及人机交互系统的实用化。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对当前目标说话人提取基准脱离真实场景的问题，本文推出SLT 2026 REAL-TSE挑战，采用真实中英文对话录音，包含重叠、混响等复杂条件，并设在线与离线两个赛道。该挑战为高效前端处理提供了标准化评测平台，有望促进ASR及人机交互系统的实用化。
